# compareoptions-off

resource.compareoptions ignoreResourceStatusField off normalizes to none with warn

!!! tip "Direction: `from`"

| | |
| --- | --- |
| Direction | `from` |
| Path | `testdata/cases/resource/compareoptions-off` |

## Input

### `argocd-cm.yaml`

```yaml
apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: argocd-cm
data:
  resource.compareoptions: |
    ignoreResourceStatusField: off
```

## Expected ArgoCDConfiguration

### `configuration.yaml`

```yaml
apiVersion: argoproj.io/v1alpha1
kind: ArgoCDConfiguration
metadata:
  name: argocd-config
  namespace: argocd
spec:
  controller:
    diff:
      compareOptions: {}
```
